productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Pack of 2 Black Boxer Trunks
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Pack of two briefs in black A hot winter collection from undercolors of benetton, this trunk brief from Undercolors is crafted from a quick dry soft cotton fabric. The cut allows free leg movement and the double layered pouch enhances durability while you enjoy abrasion free comfort what with the brand label embroidered on the waistband. Crafted from 95% cotton and 5% elastane Broad and stretchable waistband in that sits snug and comfortably Shaped to Fit doubled-layered contoured pouch Embroidered brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
